Profile & Company Information

Keep your recruiter and company details up to date to build trust with candidates.

Your company details help candidates understand your brand and culture.

Invite team members and control what they can access.

Roles

  • Admin — Full access
  • Recruiter — Hiring access
  • Viewer — Read-only

You can control who can post jobs, view candidates, and manage billing.

Notifications

Choose how and when you receive updates.

New candidate application
Candidate shortlisted
Interview scheduled
Job post expiry reminder
Subscription & billing alerts

You can change notification preferences anytime.

Account Actions

Manage critical actions related to your recruiter account.

Temporarily Disable Account

Pause your recruiter account if you are not actively hiring. You can re-enable it anytime.

Permanently Delete Account

This action is irreversible. All company data, job posts, and candidate information will be permanently removed.

Please proceed carefully. Some actions may permanently affect your recruiter account and company data.
